headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -19.3)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 302% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 116 quotes, including 94 at strong intensity - people are expressing anger and annoyance very forcefully today.

• The frustration score of 45.5 sits in the middle of the typical range, showing this level of venting is fairly normal for recent months.

• Optimism bounced back significantly from yesterday's negative territory, while fears dropped further below average.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
